calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proof That The Doj Received The Bof 4544 Form
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Victoria Li appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mrs. Li explained how and why the Airbnb 401 (k) plans were changed to become Blended Funds Investments, stated that the funds are in a retirement account at Fidelity, and spoke of the difficulty the administrator had with having to go to several banks. Mrs. Li also stated that the family would like to make distribution to the beneficiary (the mother/only beneficiary) so that she can open the accounts, that the mother agreed to have one account, and that they are ready for final distribution, but there is a remaining issue with the guns. The court informed Mrs. Li of the requirement of providing form BOF 4544/a report to the DOJ regarding the transfer of the firearms. The Petition for Waiver of Accounting, etc. is under submission with the intent to grant but only allowing and not approving investment of the cash in excess of the FDIC limit. Status on filing of proof that the DOJ received the BOF 4544 form is set for May 2, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.
